svg.title: RDMA WRITE 상세 흐름
svg.desc: Initiator가 remote registered memory에 데이터를 push하는 one-sided WRITE 동작

g.text: Eth · IP · UDP(4791) · BTH · RETH · payload · ICRC
BTH: opcode, dest QPN, PSN · RETH: VA, rkey, DMAlen

svg.text: multi-packet stream, PSN incremented per MTU-sized packet

g.text: RC mode: target enforces in-order PSN
out-of-order → NAK, retransmit from missing PSN
in-order delivery: PSN 기반 RC 보장
access control: rkey + MPT 매칭 필수
completion notify: signaled WR만 CQE 생성
